      "それは胃の中に巨大な胃虫（Hirudinella ventricosa）という線形動物寄生虫を持っています。",
      "それはメスがオスよりも多い性比を持っています。",
      "それは貴重で価値のあるゲームフィッシュにするスピードと質の高さを持っています。",

      "それは浮力のある卵によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは外洋性の幼生によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは繊細から高密度までの身によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは最初の突進におけるスピードと強さによって特徴づけられます。"

About: It is about a scombrid fish found worldwide in tropical and subtropical seas.
Affects: It affects local populations with heavy commercial and sport-fishing pressure.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with deep-water oil and gas platforms in the Gulf of Mexico.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the scombrid family.
ConsistsOf: Its diet consists of 84.64% native fish, 14.26% cephalopods, and 1.1% crustaceans.
HasA: It has a pattern of irregular vertical blue bars on its sides.
It has a trematode parasite, the giant stomach worm, living in its stomachs.
It has a gender ratio that favors females over males.
It has a high quality that makes it a prized and valued game fish.
It has speed and strength in its first run.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by its speed and high quality.
It is characterized by its iridescent blue back.
It is characterized by its silvery sides with a pattern of irregular vertical blue bars.
It is characterized by razor sharp teeth.
It is characterized by its buoyant eggs.
It is characterized by its pelagic larvae.
It is characterized by its delicate to dense flesh.
It is characterized by its speed and strength.
IsA: It is a prized and valued game fish.
It is a pelagic marine species.
It is a premium-priced commercial food fish.
It is a highly prized sport-fishing catch.
KnownAs: It is known as ono in Hawaii.
It is sometimes called hoo in the United States.
It is known in sport-fishing circles for the speed and strength of its first run.
KnownFor: It is known for its speed and high quality.
It is known for being a prized and valued game fish.
It is known for its razor sharp teeth.
It is known for its speed and strength of its first run.
LocatedIn: It is located worldwide in tropical and subtropical seas.
It is located in Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans.
It is located in the Gulf of Mexico.
OccurredIn: It occurred in tropical and subtropical seas.
It occurred in Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans.
It occurred in the Western and Central Pacific Ocean.
It occurred in the Gulf of Mexico.
PartOf: It is part of the scombrid family.
UsedAs: It is used as a premium-priced commercial food fish.
It is used as a highly prized sport-fishing catch.
UsedFor: It is used for sport fishing.
UsedIn: It is used in artisanal commercial fisheries.
It is used in longline fisheries for tuna, billfish, and dolphinfish.
It is used in tuna purse seine fisheries.
